data.title: S&P 500 Nears Another All-Time High: What's Driving The Action?
data.description: Stocks are mixed nearing midday Friday, with the major indices staying near the flatline as traders digest weaker-than-expected retail sales, potential tariffs and geopolitical developments.

data.title: Lottery.com Bets Big On International Growth With New Gaming Tech Acquisition; Stock Jumps
data.description: Shares of Lottery.com are soaring after the company signed an MOU with PlusEVO Ltd. to acquire an advanced gaming platform. The $1.5 million all-stock deal strengthens the company's international expansion efforts, focusing on scalability, security, and compliance.

data.title: Tesla Vs. Ford: New Defiance ETF Capitalized On Market Disruptors
data.description: Defiance ETFs introduces innovative Battleshares ETFs for strategic rivalries in leading industries. First fund: TSLA vs F, a long/short strategy.
